title: Image based selective mechanical weeding for field vegetables (Garford Robocrop and Naoi – Dino)
description: A guide to image-based selective mechanical weeding systems for field vegetable crops, detailing the Garford Robocrop InRow Weeder and the autonomous Naio Dino robot. These technologies enable precise inter- and intra-row weeding to reduce herbicide use and improve operational efficiency in vegetable production.
